root_cause: Referenced Secret is missing a required key
evidence: Missing Secret key surfaces across multiple kubelet startup checks

causes.message: Required key 'password' does not exist in Secret 'app-secret'
Kubelet cannot resolve required Secret-backed configuration for startup

likely_causes: Secret key name typo in an env or volume item reference
Secret was updated and no longer includes the expected key
Workload manifest expects secret data that was never populated
suggested_checks: Review secretKeyRef and secret volume item keys in the Pod spec
